data.title: CACI Continues to Deliver Accurate, Mission-Ready Tactical Satellite Communications to Special Operations Forces
data.description: A technology task order has been granted to CACI International Inc (NYSE: CACI) in Reston, Va., worth up to $231 million over five years, including a base year and four optional years. This contract will involve providing satellite communication support to the U.S. Special Operations Command, allowing for improved program visibility at the Naval Information Warfare Center (NIWC) Atlantic. This agreement signifies CACI's extensive experience in serving NIWC Atlantic and reinforces their dedication to delivering accurate and timely solutions.

data.title: Veratad Among First Globally Certified to ISO/IEC 27566-1:2025 for Age Assurance
data.description: Veratad Technologies, LLC, based in Teaneck, New Jersey, disclosed on April 16, 2026, that they have attained certification to ISO/IEC 27566-1:2025. This certification is a significant achievement as it is the latest global standard for age validation systems. Veratad Technologies is known for offering age and identity verification solutions on a worldwide scale. This certification underscores their commitment to maintaining high standards in their services.

data.title: VIN Foundation Makes Urgent Call To Class Of 2026 Veterinary Graduates, And Those Who Advise Them: Do NOT Consolidate. Student Loan Rules Have Changed, Avoid This One Critical Mistake
data.description: Join the free webinar "New Veterinary Graduate Student Loan Playbook" on Wednesday, April 22, 2026, to learn how to minimize risk for new grads. The event will be held in DAVIS, California, hosted by the VIN Foundation, a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. Gain valuable insights on managing student loans effectively.

data.title: Mirion Announces Earnings Release and Conference Call Date for First Quarter 2026
data.description: Mirion (NYSE: MIR) has disclosed plans to unveil their financial reports for the first quarter of 2026 post-market hours on Tuesday, April 28, 2026. Subsequently, on Wednesday, April 29, 2026, at 10:00 am ET, they will conduct a conference call to delve into these outcomes. Those interested can join the call by dialing either 1-877-407-9208 or 1-201-493-6784 and asking to be added to the Mirion Technologies, Inc. earnings call. Additionally, a live webcast will also be accessible for viewing.

data.title: Alliant Energy Corporation Declares Quarterly Common Stock Dividend
data.description: On the 322nd consecutive quarter since 1946, the Board of Directors of Alliant Energy Corporation (NASDAQ: LNT) in MADISON, Wis., has announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.5350 per share. This will be payable on May 15, 2026, to shareholders of record as of April 30, 2026. Alliant Energy Corporation is part of the S&P 500 Dividend Aristocrats Index, known for providing regulated services.

data.title: ISG Launches First-of-its-Kind Index to Measure AI’s Impact on Technology Services Sector
data.description: A new benchmark called the ISG AI Index™ was introduced by ISG in Stamford, Conn. The index is the first of its kind and aims to measure the influence of AI on the worldwide technology and business services industry.

data.title: Inventia Life Science Launches RASTRUM Validated Solutions to Accelerate Decision-Grade Data
data.description: Sydney-based company Inventia Life Science unveiled their latest product, RASTRUM™ Validated Solutions, aimed at assisting drug discovery teams in producing high-quality data from 3D cell models efficiently and reliably. The new offering, powered by the RASTRUM platform, offers predetermined model templates for consistent, biologically significant 3D data within specific usage scenarios. This development aims to streamline the process, ensuring faster, more accurate results, and bolstering confidence in the outcomes.

data.title: Club Offers for Travel Enthusiasts in the UK
data.description: London, 16th April 2026 - Travelzoo® has unveiled an exciting array of new Club Offers for Club Members in the UK. Amongst the selection are three standout deals, meticulously sourced and secured for travel enthusiasts. One of the offers includes a luxurious week in Crete with meals and private pool access priced at £799 per person. This exclusive opportunity is part of the ongoing efforts by Travelzoo® to provide its members with exceptional travel experiences.

data.title: MATRIX RENEWABLES ANNOUNCES COMMERCIAL OPERATIONS AND INVESTMENT TAX CREDIT FUNDING WITH CONCURRENT TERM CONVERSION FOR A 281MWDC SOLAR PROJECT IN BELL COUNTY, TEXAS
data.description: On April 16, 2026, Matrix Renewables, a global renewable energy platform supported by TPG Rise, disclosed the commencement of commercial operations. They also confirmed the successful securing of Investment Tax Credit ("ITC") funding and the conversion of their construction financing to long-term debt.

data.title: Elevate Increases Occupancy from 65% to 89% at Burleson Asset Through Targeted Operational Strategy
data.description: Burleson, Texas - Elevate Commercial Investment Group has achieved an impressive 35% growth in Net Operating Income (NOI) by implementing strategic operational strategies and concentrating on resident-centered improvements. In the multifamily sector of April 16, 2026, they have shown that stability is now a proactive process rather than merely a static achievement.
